title: DataWeaveResource - Metadata API
description: Represents the DataWeaveScriptResource class that is generated for all DataWeave scripts. DataWeave scripts can be directly invoked from Apex.

apiVersion.description: The API version for this component.

isGlobal.description: When set to true, the generated DataWeaveScriptResource class is global.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="DataWeaveResource">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:MetadataWithContent">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="apiVersion" type="xsd:double"/>
        <xsd:element name="isGlobal" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="isProtected" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="MetadataWithContent">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="content" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:base64Binary"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
